title: Christmas Greeting
content:
A word of Godspeed and good cheer
     To all on earth, or far or near,
     Or friend or foe, or thine or mine -
     In echo of the voice divine,
     Heard when the star bloomed forth and lit
     The world's face, with God's smile on it.
meaning:
James Whitcomb Riley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Christmas Greeting"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
